query:
UPDATE enhancements
            SET enhancement_name = $1,
                description = $2,
                input_quantity = $3,
                quantity_unit = $4,
                estimated_input_cost = $5,
                service_duration_hours = $6,
                estimated_completion_days = $7,
                deliverables = $8,
                prerequisites = $9,
                is_complete = $10,
                completed_at = $11,
                metadata = $12,
                is_active = $13,
                updated_at = $14
            WHERE id = $15
